prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约9828名、9383名、9941名、19597名、17772名。2021–2023年位次在9300–10000区间窄幅波动；2024年因选科要 求调整为"物理、化学(2科必选)"，位次骤降至约19597名；2025年回升至约17772名，较2024年前移约1825名，显示考生对新选科要求逐步适应；该校在海南省 综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为15人，2024年增至30人，2025年扩至45人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划45人，与2025年持平。计划停止扩招，对位次前移的支撑减弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与该校农林特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；东北农业大学为国家"211工程"和"双一流"建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第120名，近年排名稳定在116–122名区间，属于中游211院校，农林类特色鲜明。；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档事件；抖音学校热度排名第95位，评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高，报考关注度无明显异常波动。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 食品科学与 工程类对应"生化环材"大类，2024年该大类热度评估为"一般观望"，较2023年"明显劝退"有所改善；计算机类、电气工程等热门专业热度持续偏高。海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约15.7%，竞争显著加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，海南省考生需跨省就读；该校在海南省招生占比极小（2025年约0.8%），属于典 型的跨省招生，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升趋势、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生总数大幅增加（+15.7%）导致竞争加剧等因素，预计20 26年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约17972名，波动区间17472–18472名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间17472–18472名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业适度冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<17472名）可重点冲刺金融学类、计算机类等 热门专业；位次接近区间下限（>18472名）建议优先考虑三档中食品科学与工程类（A-学科）等特色专业，兼顾学科实力与录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 9828, 9383, 9941, 19597, and 17772 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 9300–10000 range. In 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics, Chemistry (2 subjects mandatory)", the ranking sharply dropped to about 19597. In 2025, it rebounded to approximately 17772, moving forward about 1825 places compared to 2024, indicating that candidates are gradually adapting to the new subject requirements. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province: 15 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 30 in 2024, and expanded to 45 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan (from the enrollment plan document) is 45 students, unchanged from 2025. The cessation of enrollment expansion weakens support for the forward movement of rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, which highly aligns with the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics and has a certain appeal for related major applications. Northeast Agricultural University is a national "211 Project" and "Double First-Class" construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 120th, with recent rankings stable in the 116–122 range, placing it as a mid-tier 211 university with distinctive agricultural and forestry features. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. On Douyin, the university's popularity ranking is 95th, with a rating of "average", indicating low exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Food Science and Engineering category falls under the "Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials" (BCEM) broad category. In 2024, the popularity of this broad category was assessed as "generally wait-and-see", an improvement from the "clearly discouraged" assessment in 2023. Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering continue to have high popularity. In 2026, the total number of Hainan Province college entrance examination registrants is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, requiring Hainan candidates to study across provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Hainan Province is very small (about 0.8% in 2025), making it a typical cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of Hainan candidates (+15.7%) leading to intensified competition, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17972, with a fluctuation range of 17472–18472.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 17472–18472, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and safely fall back on Tier 3 majors. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<17472), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Finance and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (>18472), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors like Food Science and Engineering (A- discipline) to balance academic strength and admission probability.
